2026-05-04

  • Spendbase/cadeft
    • rune-index every fixed-width parser; preserve French chars

2026-05-01

  • MorganaFuture/watchman
    • feat(mcp): stamp agent identity into search_entities responses

2026-04-24

  • Stashchenko/iso8583
    • Revert "allow preserving unknown fields instead of discarding them (#393)"
    • allow preserving unknown fields instead of discarding them (#393) (#397)
    • feat: add YAML serialization/deserialization for message specs (#409)
    • Update README.md
    • allow preserving unknown fields instead of discarding them (#393)
    • Fix getters (#396)
    • feat: add MessageScanner for partial message parsing (#413)
    • docs: describe UnknownCompositeTags and MarshalPath with unknown tag
    • Marshal unmarshal by path (#391)
    • add UnmarshalPath to README.md
    • replace index with iso8583 field tag in README examples
    • Support composites with optional repeating fields (#398)
    • do not ignore tests
    • add UnknownTags helper function (#405)
    • feat: add support for re-marshaling unknown TLV tags in MarshalPath (#412)
    • Refactor: Lazy load field (#392)
    • fix: support TagSpec TLV fields in JSON export/import (#408)
